data.name: HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton
HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton

data.description: HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton cites or references HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton.
HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton mentions Whole-Body Control (WBC).
HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton is based on or uses Standard Quadratic Program (QP).
HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton uses Model Predictive Control (MPC).
HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton cites or references HumanoidExo: Scalable Whole-Body Humanoid Manipulation via Wearable Exoskeleton.
